column6: This table contains l3-mac configuration information of each vlan interface.
An entry in the hpicfL3MacConfigIfEntry contains the l3-mac feature specific configuration information. This table augments the ifRcvAddressTable.
Timeout in seconds when an advertisement pkt will be sent out with the ifRcvAddressAddress of this entry as the source mac so that the downstream switches learn this mac-address.
The compliance statement for HP routers running L3-Mac feature and implementing the HP-ICF-L3MAC-MIB.
A collection of HP proprietary objects to support L3-Mac feature on HP routers.
